# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "virtualNetworkName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subnetNames": {
      "type": "object",
      "defaultValue": {
        "webSubnet": {
          "name": "Web-Subnet",
          "prefix": "10.0.1."
        },
        "appSubnet": {
          "name": "App-Subnet",
          "prefix": "10.0.2."
        },
        "databaseSubnet": {
          "name": "Database-Subnet",
          "prefix": "10.0.3."
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "name": "[parameters('virtualNetworkName')]",
      "location": "West US",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetNames').webSubnet.name]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetNames').webSubnet.prefix]24",
              "privateEndpointNetworkPolicies": "Disabled"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetNames').appSubnet.name]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetNames').appSubnet.prefix]24",
              "privateEndpointNetworkPolicies": "Disabled"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetNames').databaseSubnet.name]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetNames').databaseSubnet.prefix]24",
              "privateEndpointNetworkPolicies": "Disabled"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {}
}
